name: nvshmem
desc: NVIDIA NVSHMEM is a parallel programming interface for NVIDIA GPUs based on OpenSHMEM. NVSHMEM can significantly reduce multi-process communication and coordin…
descFull: NVIDIA NVSHMEM is a parallel programming interface for NVIDIA GPUs based on OpenSHMEM. NVSHMEM can significantly reduce multi-process communication and coordination overheads by allowing programmers to perform one-sided communication from within CUDA kernels and on CUDA streams.
